title: Integration tests, naming guard, docs
description: End-to-end hardening: tests/cli.rs coverage for grove config non-TTY, init idempotency (re-run duplicates nothing), allowlist enforcement (config omitting find refuses it at dispatch); repo-wide naming-guard test (no fastcontext string in core/, cli/, README.md, skills/); README + CHANGELOG sections for mcp-llm mode, grove config, and health/shutdown semantics; stack-checklist review (MCP schema plainness, stdio hygiene, exit codes).
